features.name: Divine Smite
features.desc: When you hit with a melee weapon, expend a spell slot to deal extra 2d8 radiant (+1d8 per slot above 1st). +1d8 vs undead/fiends.

features.name: Fighting Style
features.desc: Choose a Fighting Style: Defense, Dueling, Great Weapon Fighting, or Protection.

features.name: Channel Divinity
features.desc: 2 uses per rest. Options vary by oath.

features.name: Faithful Steed
features.desc: Cast Find Steed without expending a spell slot. 1/long rest.

features.name: Aura of Protection
features.desc: You and allies within 10 ft add your CHA mod to saving throws.

features.name: Abjure Foes
features.desc: As an action, frighten creatures within 60 ft. WIS save or frightened + speed 0.

features.name: Aura of Courage
features.desc: You and allies within 10 ft can't be frightened.

features.name: Radiant Strikes
features.desc: Your weapon attacks deal an extra 1d8 radiant damage.

features.name: Restoring Touch
features.desc: Use Lay on Hands to remove conditions: blinded, charmed, deafened, frightened, paralyzed, stunned.

features.name: Aura Expansion
features.desc: Aura of Protection and Aura of Courage range increases to 30 ft.

features.name: Epic Boon
features.desc: Gain an Epic Boon feat or another feat of your choice.
